description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black and dark gray color scheme. The body is streamlined, with a long, angular barrel and a compact, ergonomic pistol grip at the rear. The upper receiver appears to have a transparent or semi-transparent section, possibly for visualizing internal mechanisms or ammunition. The rifle lacks visible iron sights or optics, and the barrel is capped with a simple muzzle, without any advanced muzzle device. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, giving it a lightweight yet durable appearance. The design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and compactness are important.
description: A sleek, modern rifle with a long, angular barrel, ergonomic pistol grip, and a streamlined black and gray body. The design is tactical and compact, with a transparent section on the upper receiver.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the symmetrical, streamlined barrel profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the rifle, the transparent upper receiver, and the ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the pointed barrel tip and the compact rear grip, with minimal stock extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined body, transparent receiver, and the overall slim profile.
